Grow Your Area

A future SLYDE program for Slyders who help grow courier strength in their parish

The Area Builder Rewards concept is designed to let approved Slyders help expand the network in their own towns and unlock commission-free reward windows when quality referrals become real operational couriers.

Structured growth. Quality referrals. Stronger launch readiness.

Apply to Become a SlyderCheck Coverage Hotspots

Future program shape

Grow your area, then earn more from your own work

The public website captures referral attribution during application.
The SLYDE app will own validation, milestones, and reward logic.
The strongest version of the program rewards quality activation, not raw signups.
Priority towns can unlock stronger growth incentives as the network expands.

Why This Exists

The fastest network growth comes from trusted local relationships

SLYDE wants courier density in the right towns, not just more signups. A structured area-builder model gives approved Slyders a way to help build readiness in the places they know best.

Built for growth

Help build courier density where it matters

The program is designed to encourage approved Slyders to help expand trustworthy courier participation in the towns and parishes where SLYDE is actively building network strength.

No cash payout

Rewards are tied to your own work on the platform

Instead of cash affiliate commissions, SLYDE plans to reward successful growth with temporary 0% platform commission windows on your own eligible deliveries.

Area-first logic

Priority towns can unlock stronger reward windows

Hotspot towns and under-covered parishes can receive stronger reward settings so the platform grows where courier strength is most needed.

Operational control

This is a network-building system, not generic referral spam

Only quality referrals that move into real onboarding, approval, activation, and readiness should qualify a reward.

How It Would Work

The public website starts the referral trail, but the SLYDE app owns the reward system

This keeps the program clean: the website captures referral attribution during onboarding, while the SLYDE app later validates the referral, tracks milestones, and manages the commission-free reward.

1

A Slyder shares a referral code or invite link from the SLYDE app.

2

A new applicant applies through the public SLYDE website with that referral attached.

3

SLYDE reviews, approves, and activates the referred applicant through the normal onboarding process.

4

Once the referred applicant reaches the required activation milestone, the referrer unlocks a commission-free reward window.

System split

Website role: capture referral code or invite link during application. App role: validate referral, detect duplicates, qualify rewards, and apply 0% commission windows on eligible deliveries.

Reward Model

The reward is not cash. It is extra earning power on the platform.

This is the recommended model because it keeps cash inside the business, rewards real activity, and aligns the referrer with long-term platform use.

Standard growth area

5 days or 10 deliveries

Recommended default reward window for normal towns and parishes in active network build.

Priority growth town

7 days or 15 deliveries

Recommended stronger reward for under-covered areas where SLYDE wants to accelerate local courier density.

Strategic launch area

Town-based multiplier

Ops can configure stronger reward settings for towns that are especially important to launch readiness.

Program Guardrails

This only works if the quality controls are strict

The Area Builder concept should strengthen the network, not create noise. That means the reward system has to be tied to real onboarding and anti-abuse rules.

Only approved and active Slyders should be eligible to refer.
No self-referrals or duplicate phone/email/identity referrals should qualify.
Referral rewards should only unlock after meaningful activation milestones are completed.
Eligible deliveries only: canceled, test, refunded, or fraud-flagged orders should not consume or qualify rewards.
See Coverage MomentumStart Your Slyder Application

Prepare For Area Builder Rewards

The best way to benefit later is to become an approved Slyder first

Apply now, move through onboarding, and position yourself for future network-building rewards once the program is activated inside the SLYDE app.

Jamaica-First Logistics Infrastructure

SLYDE connects courier capacity, merchant fulfillment, and partner-ready logistics workflows.

Built for local operational credibility now, with standards that can support wider Caribbean scale later.
SLYDELogistics

SLYDE is a modern logistics network for Jamaica first, designed to support courier operations, merchant fulfillment, and future Caribbean partner integrations.
